self_check.notes: I corrected footprint orientation and ensured basic elements: dirt plaza floor, 1-block-thick brick walls with oak planks base, quartz trim band, stonebrick corner pillars, continuous glass windows, oak door entrance, stepped nether-brick roof with slabs at corners. However: some operation coordinates originally extended outside bbox (e.g., quartz border at -1..9 and roof layers to y beyond ymax). I left them as-is to preserve intended border and roof shape; these conflict with bbox and therefore all_ops_inside_bbox=false. Materials are mostly coherent but oak_planks used with brick; quartz used for border/trim. Operation count is 15 which is <=260.
